Yin Shang ŚįĻŤ≥ě
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yin Shang (ŚįĻŤ≥ě). Friend of Jiang Wei in Tianshui. Surrendered Tianshui to Shu, made Prefect of Jicheng. Yin Shang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Shu Kingdom.
